name: GPS Station Map
description: Exported library panel model for re-seeding Grafana on fresh deployments.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  d.latitude,
  d.longitude,
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN -1
    WHEN d.health_check = 'passive' THEN -1
    WHEN f.disk_status = 2 THEN 1
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'healthy' AND COALESCE(f.download_status, 0) >= 2 THEN 2
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'healthy' THEN 3
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'warning' THEN 2
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'critical' THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END                                                    AS status_code,
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN -1
    WHEN d.health_check = 'passive' THEN -1
    WHEN f.status_24h = 0 THEN 3
    WHEN f.status_24h = 1 THEN 2
    WHEN f.status_24h = 2 THEN 0
    ELSE 0
  END                                                    AS data_status_code,
  d.station_id                                           AS "ID",
  COALESCE(s.station_name, d.station_id)                AS "Name",
  CASE
    WHEN d.model_mismatch IS TRUE THEN '✗' || COALESCE(d.receiver_type, '—')
    WHEN d.receiver_type IS NULL  THEN '⚠—'
    ELSE COALESCE(d.receiver_type, '—')
  END                                                    AS "Receiver",
  COALESCE(d.antenna_type, '—')                         AS "Antenna",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check = 'passive' THEN NULL
    WHEN d.seconds_since_update IS NULL THEN '—'
    WHEN d.seconds_since_update < 60 THEN d.seconds_since_update::text || 's'
    WHEN d.seconds_since_update < 3600 THEN (d.seconds_since_update / 60)::text || 'm'
    WHEN d.seconds_since_update < 86400 THEN round(d.seconds_since_update / 3600.0, 1)::text || 'h'
    ELSE round(d.seconds_since_update / 86400.0, 1)::text || 'd'
  END                                                    AS "Check",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check = 'passive'
      THEN COALESCE(d.station_status, 'passive')
    WHEN d.connection_state IS NULL     THEN '—'
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'online'  THEN 'online '   || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    WHEN d.connection_state = 'degraded' THEN 'degraded ' || format_duration(d.state_duration)
    ELSE                                     'offline '   || format_duration(d.state_duration)
  END                                                    AS "Conn",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check IS NOT NULL
      THEN COALESCE(d.station_status, d.health_check, '—')
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'critical' THEN '✗' || d.overall_status
    WHEN d.overall_status = 'warning'  THEN '⚠' || d.overall_status
    ELSE COALESCE(d.overall_status, '—')
  END                                                    AS "Health",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check = 'passive' THEN '—'
    WHEN d.voltage IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(d.voltage::numeric, 1) || ' V'
    ELSE '—'
  END                                                    AS "Voltage",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL OR d.health_check = 'passive' THEN '—'
    ELSE COALESCE(d.satellites_tracked::text, '—')
  END                                                    AS "Sats",
  CASE
    WHEN d.station_status IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(d.station_status, '—')
    WHEN d.health_check = 'passive'   THEN '—'
    ELSE COALESCE(d.ntrip_status, '—')
  END                                                    AS "NTRIP",
  CASE WHEN d.latitude IS NOT NULL
    THEN ROUND(d.latitude::numeric, 4)::text || ','
      || ROUND(d.longitude::numeric, 4)::text
    ELSE '—'
  END                                                    AS "Location",
  CASE WHEN s.ip_address IS NOT NULL AND s.http_port IS NOT NULL
    THEN host(s.ip_address) || ':' || s.http_port::text
    ELSE NULL END                                        AS "Web"
,  host(s.ip_address)                                     AS "Router"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_data_flow_status f ON f.sid = d.station_id
LEFT JOIN stations s ON s.sid = d.station_id
WHERE d.latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND d.longitude IS NOT NULL
  AND ('$area' = 'all' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_area_members sam WHERE sam.sid = d.station_id AND sam.area_id = '$area'))
  AND (${station:singlequote} = 'all' OR d.station_id = ${station:singlequote})
  AND (${receiver:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${receiver:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.receiver_type IS NULL) OR d.receiver_type = ${receiver:singlequote})
  AND (${antenna:singlequote} = 'all' OR (${antenna:singlequote} = 'NONE' AND d.antenna_type IS NULL) OR d.antenna_type = ${antenna:singlequote})
  AND (${owner:singlequote} = 'all' OR s.station_owner = ${owner:singlequote})
  AND (
    ('$status_filter' = 'all'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed'))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'all_special')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'online' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'offline' AND d.connection_state = 'offline' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'degraded' AND d.connection_state = 'degraded' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'critical' AND d.overall_status = 'critical' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'warning' AND d.overall_status = 'warning' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ping_failed' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Ping%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ftp_down' AND d.ftp_open = false AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'ctrl_refused' AND d.control_open = false AND d.is_online = true)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'disk_warning' AND d.status_details LIKE '%Disk%' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'discontinued' AND d.station_status = 'discontinued')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'passive' AND d.health_check = 'passive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'inactive' AND d.station_status = 'inactive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'suppressed' AND d.station_status = 'suppressed')
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_rinex_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 1)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '1hr_rinex_missing' AND f.status_1hz = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = '24hr_raw_missing' AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL
        AND f.status_24h = 2)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'voltage_warning' AND d.voltage IS NOT NULL AND (d.status_details LIKE '%Voltage%' OR (d.is_online = false AND ((COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery' AND (d.voltage < 11.8 OR d.voltage > 15.0)) OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc' AND (d.voltage < 12.0 OR d.voltage > 16.5)) OR (s.power_type = 'mains' AND (d.voltage < 15.0 OR d.voltage > 25.0))))))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'stall' AND d.station_id IN (SELECT sid FROM download_log WHERE outcome = 'stall_timeout' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'low_sats' AND d.satellites_tracked IS NOT NULL AND d.satellites_tracked < 4 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'download_warning' AND f.download_status >= 1 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'disk_error' AND f.disk_status = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL)
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_online'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_offline'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.connection_state = 'offline' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_critical'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.overall_status = 'critical' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_warning'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.overall_status = 'warning' AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_ctrl_refused'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.control_open = false AND d.is_online = true AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_inactive'
      AND d.station_status IS DISTINCT FROM 'inactive')
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_24hr_rinex_missing'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (f.status_24h = 2 AND d.station_status IS NULL AND d.health_check IS NULL))
    OR ('$status_filter' = 'not_voltage_warning'
      AND COALESCE(d.station_status, '') NOT IN ('inactive', 'discontinued', 'suppressed')
      AND NOT (d.voltage IS NOT NULL AND (d.status_details LIKE '%Voltage%'
        OR (d.is_online = false AND ((COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') = 'battery'
          AND (d.voltage < 11.8 OR d.voltage > 15.0))
          OR (s.power_type = 'dcdc' AND (d.voltage < 12.0 OR d.voltage > 16.5))
          OR (s.power_type = 'mains' AND (d.voltage < 15.0 OR d.voltage > 25.0)))))))
  )
ORDER BY d.station_id
